non_claims: 本 current-state formal evidence execution re-entry preflight preview 不执行 formal write、retry、unfreeze，也不释放 freeze 或 execution lock，不写 reentry result、repair result、freeze release result、verification result、rollback result。
本 current-state formal evidence execution re-entry preflight preview 不把 candidate_preview_with_hold 升级为 accepted、integrated 或 production_ready。
